simulation_styles.move_fast: Emphasize speed-first drift: shortcuts, review debt, cohesion quietly erodes.
simulation_styles.empower_teams: Emphasize autonomy collapse: trusted in stability, overridden under risk.
simulation_styles.ai_first: Emphasize mandate vs adoption lag: governance and design lag behind AI velocity.
simulation_styles.founder_mode: Emphasize centralization drift: barrels bottleneck, decisions pull upward.
simulation_styles.high_experimentation: Emphasize learning collapse: experiments run, insights don't propagate.
simulation_styles.ai_native_pms: Emphasize coordination trap: PMs talk about building but calendar wins.
simulation_styles.design_led: Emphasize cohesion bypass: design gates erode when deadlines hit.
simulation_styles.minimal_process: Emphasize process creep: principles rhetoric, paperwork reality.
simulation_styles.product_led_growth: Emphasize GTM pull: sales motion overrides product loops.
simulation_styles.influence_without_politics: Emphasize decision theater: alignment rituals without real buy-in.
simulation_styles.high_performance_culture: Emphasize safety erosion: standards rise, blame surfaces under miss.
simulation_styles.lean_constraints: Emphasize hidden hiring: lean narrative, shadow headcount growth.
simulation_styles.bottom_up_ai: Emphasize grassroots vs mandate friction: pockets of wins, no scale.
simulation_styles.evals_first_ai: Emphasize ship-before-eval: velocity wins, monitoring chases releases.
simulation_styles.platform_org: Emphasize silo drift: shared platform rhetoric, GM fiefdom behavior.
